title: sabicea proselyta
intro: Sabicea proselyta, also known as the African mistletoe, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Sabicea proselyta is often used in infusion or decoction form, and can be found in various African traditional medicine practices.
